query:
INSERT INTO promo_codes (code, description, discountType, discountValue, maxUses, usedCount, isActive, appliesTo)
VALUES (
  'TESTFREE',
  '100% off for testing — no charge',
  'free',
  100,
  NULL,
  0,
  1,
  NULL
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  discountType = 'free',
  discountValue = 100,
  maxUses = NULL,
  isActive = 1,
  description = '100% off for testing — no charge';
